findings.title: Toggle click did not update visuals OR mutated URL
findings.expected: before=LIVE, after=MOCK, header amber, storage=mock, URL stays ?mode=live
findings.actual: before=LIVE, after=LIVE, data-mode=live, flask=0, storage=mock, url=http://localhost:3001/?mode=live
findings.hypothesis: Toggle handler is writing URL OR URL effect overrides storage write

findings.title: localStorage persistence not restored on refresh
findings.expected: before storage=mock, after refresh: toggle=MOCK, data-mode=mock, storage=mock
findings.hypothesis: readInitialMode not reading localStorage OR hydration mismatch

findings.title: Live trigger did not finalize within 5min cap
findings.expected: lifecycle finalizes SUBMITTED or FAILED inside 5min
findings.hypothesis: Backend lifecycle stalled — seeder gas, RPC, or judge panel timeout

findings.title: Sticky header not pinned on leaderboard
findings.expected: header bounding box y≈0 while scrollY > 50
findings.hypothesis: ancestor overflow rule clipping sticky positioning
